case_id: Brown v. Board of Education of Topeka, 347 U.S. 483 (1954)

pi_items.verified_value: Brown v. Board of Education of Topeka
pi_items.source: Verified against National Archives, Library of Congress, and inject_references.py script (line 22). The full official name is 'Brown v. Board of Education of Topeka' but 'Brown v. Board of Education' is the commonly used citation form.

Verified against National Archives, Library of Congress, Justia, and inject_references.py script (lines 25-26: reporterVolume='347', reporter='U.S.', firstPage='483'). This is the official citation for the main Brown I decision.
Verified against National Archives, Library of Congress, Oyez, and inject_references.py script (line 27: dateDecided='1954'). Brown v. Board of Education was decided on May 17, 1954.
Hardcoded in setup_task.sh (line 16) and export_result.sh (line 15). This is a task-defined path.
Pattern tested and confirmed to correctly match APA-style citations where the year appears before reporter information. Example: '(1954) 347 U.S. 483 Brown v. Board of Education'

Pattern tested and confirmed to correctly match Bluebook-style citations where case name appears before reporter information and year at end. Example: 'Brown v. Board of Education, 347 U.S. 483 (1954)'

privileged_info_summary: Brown v. Board of Education of Topeka is the landmark 1954 Supreme Court case with official citation 347 U.S. 483. The task injects real historical case data from this publicly documented Supreme Court decision into a Jurism database. The case was decided in 1954 and is cited as 347 U.S. 483 in the United States Reports. The task verifies correct citation formatting by checking whether the output matches Bluebook style (case name, volume reporter page, year) versus APA style (case name, year, volume reporter page).
